title: Command Cockpit Unlock Badges
summary: Turned the cockpit signal strip into compact reward badges with glyphs, state metadata, and subtle motion.
changes: Added GATE/WIN/RUN/XP glyphs to the Quest cockpit signal counters.
Added signal state metadata for locked, clear, earned, live, high, scout, and seed badge treatments.
Rendered signal badges with compact glyph chips and animated shine without adding a new cockpit row.
Tuned mobile badge sizing so the cockpit stays dense and readable.
Recorded the unlock-badge pass as the latest platform UI unlock in generated snapshot history.
